info.name: FIX Space API
info.description: FIX Space (FIX Space) API — REST endpoints for managing spaces, databases, templates, records, properties, and user settings.

request.description: Revoke all refresh tokens for the authenticated user (logout from all devices).
List all active (non-revoked, non-expired) refresh token sessions for the authenticated user.
Revoke a specific session by its refresh token ID. Returns 403 if the session belongs to another user.
Set session cookie from access token (OAuth bridge). Used after Google OAuth flow.
Тільки для NODE_ENV=development. Вручну активує користувача без пошти.
Тільки для NODE_ENV=development. Повністю видаляє акаунт для повторної реєстрації.
Check API and database health. No authentication required.
